# AI Agent Index — Vendored Dataset (CC BY 4.0)

This directory vendors **The 2025 AI Agent Index** dataset for use in Agenttic's
agent-card field registry and Catalog import.

- **Source (Zenodo):** https://zenodo.org/records/19592546
- **DOI:** 10.5281/zenodo.19592546
- **Title:** The 2025 AI Agent Index
- **License:** Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (**CC BY 4.0**)
  — https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
- **Vendored on:** 2026-07-07
- **Files:** `2025_annotations.json` (30 agents), `2025_annotations.csv`

## Attribution
Data © the AI Agent Index authors, licensed CC BY 4.0. Agenttic uses this dataset
under the terms of that license: the source, DOI, and license are preserved here
and surfaced wherever Index-derived data appears (agent cards, Catalog, exports).
See `docs/ATTRIBUTION.md`.

## Use in Agenttic (honesty contract)
- Index-derived agent data is imported with **`documented` provenance** and keeps
  its citations (Hard Rule 17).
- It is shown in the **Catalog only** and is **never mixed into measured scores or
  score leaderboards** (Hard Rule 17).
- The card field registry is **generated deterministically** from this file — never
  hand-transcribed (T19.2).
